name: Zucchini Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounces (1 cup) cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and microwave the sliced zucchini, chopped onion, and butter in a 2-quart casserole on high until the vegetables are tender, about 9 to 11 minutes.
2. Transfer the soup, 1 cup of water, and the zucchini mixture into a blender container. Blend on medium-high speed until smooth, approximately 1 minute.
3. Return the blended mixture to the casserole.
4. Stir in the remaining 1 cup of water, salt, basil, and pepper.
5. Cover and microwave on high until hot and bubbly, about 8 to 10 minutes. The soup can be refrigerated and served cold.
